rules.description: Captures names following kinship terms like 'Tochter' (daughter) or 'Sohn' (son).

rules.name: Name_Following_Herr_Frau
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Herr' or 'Frau' (including 'Herrn').

rules.name: Name_Following_Betreff
rules.description: Captures names appearing in subject lines (Betreff) of documents.

rules.name: Name_In_Parentheses
rules.description: Captures names in parentheses ONLY if they contain a known person title or suffix, filtering out medical/legal descriptions.
